keyPoints: Two processes P1 and P2 try to access shared resource R
P1 reads R, then tests for permission
If P1 has the permit, it acquires the lock
If P1 does not have the permit, it releases the lock
P2 tries to access R, but finds the lock held by P1
P2 must wait until P1 releases the lock
If P1 exits, P2 can acquire the lock and access R
